Very low quality—ripped off on the 3rd try I liked them first but I was wrong—they were ripped off when I tried on three times. (By the way, I am 5.4 and 118 pounds.) It was embarrassing because I was in public!! Very disappointing.

Cute Fall Pant I'm 5'7 185lbs and thought I ordered my usual size large, but XXL was delivered instead. They are massive on me, so large probably would've fit just right. The material is very soft and I love the khaki and blue color combination. Hopefully they let me exchange these for the right size.

Wonderful dupe, excellent quality These pants are great! After seeming them all over the place from various influencers, I decided to get these and try them out. I had low expectations, expecting them to be that papery, stiff, cheap material… but I was pleasantly surprised. They’re so soft and feel like soft cotton. The colors are also not too bright (my picture makes them look a tad brigjr) and not too dull—-the perfect in between. They can be dressed up or down. It’s a great piece for walking the line of looking pulled together but also super comfortable, could be used as pajamas, but with the right shirt and shoes paired it can be dressed up. I wore them already and got several compliments. I am 5’7” and they were plenty long enough for me, exactly how I want it. They are flowy and not at all sheer. The waist does go up higher on me, closer to my belly button, but it looks just fine if it’s lower too. It’s got plenty of stretch and has a working tied waist. The pockets are also functional (both in the front and the back). That being said, I ordered my normal size medium and they fit great. I’m going to try to wear them as much as I can before summer is over!

So, so cute!!! Exceeded my expectations. So soft cotton. Thicker than expected, but super drapey and very comfortable. Purchased a large, probably should have ordered a medium, but I feel like the difference in fit wouldn't be significant enough to exchange them. I'm 5'4", 155 ish. They are long on me, but still look adorable. In one of the more muted colors I'd wear to work with a bootie, a tank and a jacket, they're that good.

These are LONG I'm 5'5", and these are really long on me. Aside from that I like them. The fabric is soft, and there are front and back pockets. The front pockets are straight so not really comfortable to keep your hands in but fine for placing things. I like that the back pocket is perfect for a cell phone. They are baggy, but meant to be baggy. With the drawstring, you can wear these at various sizes so if you fluctuate a lot or have just had a baby, these would be great. I think they're cute and casual for home or relaxing outings.

Too nice to wear to bed These pajama pants are meant to be seen. Pleasantly surprised these felt like high end cotton instead of a typical poly blend. Not sheer at all. Not heavy to wear. The bad is comfortable and not constricting even on my bloated days. Length is just slightly past my ankles so I can wear sneakers or even platforms and the length will work. Looks great with a sweater just like the model pictures but also paired well my cropped old navy tees and even with my body suits since these are dressy for the style type. For reference, I’m 5’3”/32c/135-137lbs depending on the time of month/small pooch in the front since I never say no to late night street tacos/slight bit of birthing hips that never bounced back. For Gap/Old Navy and Hollister/AF denim and jeggings I get away with 6/28 for high rise and ultra high rise denim if that helps. Mid rise and low rise I’m a 4/27. Sweats and leggings of any brand I’m a womens small.

Colors are off Instead or light brownish/copper, one of the colors is super bright orange (pencil and orange highlighter for comparison). Bit clowny. Style looks great though. I wear L and 34" inseam and L ends right on my ankle.

Excellent quality and craftsmanship I knew that there was no risk in ordering Aeropostale clothes without trying them on first. For reference, I am 5 feet 5 inches tall and weigh 130 pounds. I usually wear medium-sized clothing, and I got these pants in medium size, which is US sizes 6-8 according to the measurement chart provided by the seller. The pants are a bit loose on me. They are more of a size 8 than 6. My medium is more of a size 6. I do not know if they will shrink a little after a wash. I also got a regular inseam, which is 32 inches, which is too long for me. I will have to make them shorter by at least an inch. Other than that, the pants fit my body nicely. There is nothing weird about their cut or shape. I like the fabric. It is very soft and has a little bit of stretch to it. The pants are very comfortable. The craftsmanship is impeccable. So I would highly recommend these pants if you were looking for a pair of casual ones.

On trend and comfortable I really liked these pants! I’m recently postpartum and these were really forgiving in the fit with the elastic waistband but also made my waist feel snatched. Definitely on-trend cut and styling. I love that you can pick your inseam—even though I’m 5’5”, I went with the 29 in inseam since I sized up to large for my belly recovery and they are perfect!
